name: @openclaw/desktop-electron
description: OpenClaw Desktop Electron shell with managed local runtime.

scripts.typecheck: npm run build:ts -- --noEmit && node --check src/main/index.js && node --check src/main/backup/common.js && node --check src/main/backup/daemon.js && node --check src/main/backup-manager.js && node --check src/main/linux-display.js && node --check src/main/linux-launcher.js && node --check src/main/shutdown.js && node --check src/main/tray.js && node --check src/main/runtime-manager.js && node --check src/main/runtime-paths.js && node --check src/main/setup-config.js && node --check src/main/runtime-installer.js && node --check src/preload/index.js && node --check renderer/splash.js && node --check scripts/after-pack.js && node --check scripts/build-ts.mjs && node --check scripts/dev.mjs && node --check scripts/package.mjs
